# Mewgenics Mod Developer Documentation: Master Schema Dictionary
> **Coverage note:** This file documents keys observed in the base game. For undocumented keys found in source files, see [AUDIT_GAPS.md](./AUDIT_GAPS.md). For enum values, see [Enums.md](./Enums.md).

This document is an exhaustive, auto-generated dictionary of every `.gon` property found across all 8 major engine systems. Due to the sheer volume of properties, you will need to infer their exact engine functionality through testing or context clues.

| [`right_icon`](./Enums.md#enum-right_icon) | Enum | The name of the icon to display on the right side of the damage text. | 10 ||
| [`scars`](Injuries.md#object-scars) | Object | An object mapping body parts to ranges of scar texture indices applied on injury. | 10 ||
| [`tooltip_stacks_pos`](./Strings.md#string-tooltip_stacks_pos) | String | Localization key for the tooltip description of the positive variant (e.g., stat up) of this status effect. | 10 ||
| [`quest_event`](Map_Generation_and_Routing.md#object-quest_event) | Object | An object defining the properties of a quest-related event at this node, such as its level and art. | 9 ||
| `act` | Number | The act number (game progression stage) in which this encounter or script takes place. | 9 ||
| [`alt_animations`](./Arrays.md#array-alt_animations) | Array | An array of alternative animation state replacements, each as [state, animation_name]. | 9 ||
| [`arrival_unlock`](./Enums.md#enum-arrival_unlock) | Enum | The name of the cutscene or event that is unlocked upon arrival. | 9 ||
| [`complete_act_difficulty`](./Arrays.md#array-complete_act_difficulty) | Array | An array containing the act number and difficulty level that must be completed. | 9 ||
| [`friction_start`](./Arrays.md#array-friction_start) | Array | The friction values applied to movement at the start of the particle's life. | 9 ||
| `index` | Number | The index used to order or identify this encounter within its list. | 9 ||
| [`initial_cooldown`](./Arrays.md#array-initial_cooldown) | Array | A list of possible initial cooldown values (in turns) before the encounter can trigger. | 9 ||
| [`item_rarity_costs`](#object-item_rarity_costs) | Object | Defines the cost multipliers for each item rarity tier in a shop. | 9 ||
| `lead_time` | Number | The number of turns before the event activates. | 9 ||
| [`music`](./Enums.md#enum-music) | Enum | Specifies the name of the music track to play during the encounter. | 9 ||
| [`rematch_cooldown`](./Arrays.md#array-rematch_cooldown) | Array | The minimum and maximum number of days before a rematch becomes available. | 9 ||
| [`savefile_string`](./Strings.md#string-savefile_string) | String | A unique string identifier used to track the save file associated with this encounter. | 9 ||
| `stock_fill_order` | Object | Defines the order in which shop slots are filled from the stock list. | 9 ||
| `unlit` | Boolean | If true, the effect is not affected by scene lighting. | 9 ||
| [`unlock_act_difficulty`](./Arrays.md#array-unlock_act_difficulty) | Array | An array containing the act number and difficulty level to unlock. | 9 ||
| [`unprompted`](#object-unprompted) | Object | Defines sequences of unprompted dialog events. | 8 ||
| [`also`](#object-also) | Object | Defines an additional dialog sequence that plays alongside the main one. | 8 ||
| `height` | Integer | The height in tiles the target is launched into the air. | 8 ||
| [`queue_cutscene_immediate`](./Enums.md#enum-queue_cutscene_immediate) | Enum | Determines which cutscene to play immediately upon queueing. | 8 ||
| [`reverb_empty`](House_and_Environment.md#object-reverb_empty) | Object | Defines the audio reverb settings for an empty room, including preset, amount, and volume adjustment. | 8 ||
| [`reverb_full`](House_and_Environment.md#object-reverb_full) | Object | Defines the audio reverb settings for a full room, including preset and amount. | 8 ||
| `specific_chapter` | Number | The chapter in which this buff is exclusive to. | 8 ||
| [`unknown`](#object-unknown) | Object | A generic object container for dialog and rewards, often used for unprompted sequences. | 8 ||
| `width` | Number | The number of tiles the room spans horizontally. | 8 ||
| [`back_icon`](./Enums.md#enum-back_icon) | Enum | The name of the icon to display behind the damage text. | 8 ||
| [`rotation_start`](./Arrays.md#array-rotation_start) | Array | The minimum and maximum starting rotation for a particle or visual effect. | 8 ||
| [`tag`](./Enums.md#enum-tag) | Array / Enum | Specifies the tag(s) to check on the target, used in conditional effects. | 7 ||
| [`button_nav`](#object-button_nav) | Object | Defines the directional navigation grid for UI button selection, with each button having connections to adjacent buttons. | 7 ||
| [`override_basic_attack`](./Enums.md#enum-override_basic_attack) | Enum | Specifies the ability that replaces the unit's basic attack. | 6 ||
| [`set_savefile_flag`](./Enums.md#enum-set_savefile_flag) | Enum | Determines which save file flag to set. | 6 ||
| [`unlock_boss`](./Enums.md#enum-unlock_boss) | Enum | Determines which boss encounter to unlock. | 6 ||
| [`initial_cutscene_night`](./Enums.md#enum-initial_cutscene_night) | Enum | Specifies the cutscene to play on the first night of a boss encounter. | 6 ||
| [`rematch_cutscene_night`](./Enums.md#enum-rematch_cutscene_night) | Enum | Specifies the cutscene to play on a rematch night for a boss encounter. | 6 ||
| [`desc_multiclass`](./Strings.md#string-desc_multiclass) | String | A localization key for the multiclass description of a passive ability. | 5 ||
| [`brain`](./Enums.md#enum-brain) | Enum | Specifies the AI brain type used for decision-making logic. | 5 ||
| `chapter_rare` | Number | An integer or variable controlling the number of rare item drops for the current chapter. | 5 ||
| [`decision_weights`](./Enums.md#enum-decision_weights) | Enum | Specifies the named set of decision weight presets used by the AI. | 5 ||
| `flat_cast_bonus` | Number | A flat bonus added to the AI's cast chance evaluation. | 5 ||
| [`minion_alt`](./Enums.md#enum-minion_alt) | Enum | The alternative minion type to spawn for this buff. | 5 ||
| [`move_weights`](./Enums.md#enum-move_weights) | Enum | Determines the movement strategy used by the AI when executing this move ability. | 5 ||
| `randomness` | Number | The amount of randomness added to AI decision-making to avoid predictability. | 5 ||
| `rollable` | Boolean | If false, this buff cannot be randomly rolled onto enemies. | 5 ||
| [`bonus_items`](./Arrays.md#array-bonus_items) | Array | An array of item names granted as bonus rewards. | 5 ||
| [`scale`](./Miscellaneous.md#object-scale) | Variable | The scale multiplier applied to the unit's visual size. | 5 ||
| [`areas`](./Arrays.md#array-areas) | Array | Lists the required areas that must be completed for this checkmark. | 5 ||
| [`classes`](./Arrays.md#array-classes) | Array | Lists the required classes that must be included in the party for this checkmark. | 5 ||
| `emit_shell` | Variable | The number of shell casings or particles to emit; can be a count (integer) or multiplier (float). | 5 ||
| [`emit_timespread`](./Enums.md#enum-emit_timespread) | Enum | The time spread over which emissions occur, controlling the duration of the emission burst. | 5 ||
| [`material`](./Enums.md#enum-material) | Enum | The material shader name used for rendering the visual effect. | 5 ||
| `min_difficulty` | Number | The minimum difficulty level required to earn this checkmark. | 5 ||
| `mono_cat_run` | Boolean | If true, the run uses a single cat instead of a team. | 5 ||
| `solo_cat_run` | Boolean | If true, the run is played with exactly one cat. | 5 ||
| [`spurt`](./Enums.md#enum-spurt) | Enum | The name of the spurt particle effect to play. | 5 ||
| [`Colorless`](./Arrays.md#array-colorless) | Array | Specifies the 'Colorless' form within FormChanger, used for boss dialogue. | 4 ||

| [`Butcher`](Engine_LogicKeys.md#object-butcher) | Object | Specifies the 'Butcher' form within FormChanger, used for boss dialogue. | 4 ||

| [`Tinkerer`](./Arrays.md#array-tinkerer) | Array | Form identifier for the Tinkerer boss type. | 4 ||

| [`Psychic`](./Arrays.md#array-psychic) | Array | Form identifier for the Psychic boss type, used for dialogue references. | 4 ||
| [`Medic`](./Arrays.md#array-medic) | Array | Defines a list of quotes for the Medic class. | 4 ||

| `auto_plus_signs_on_name` | Boolean | If false, plus signs are not automatically added to the status's display name. | 4 ||
| `cap_distance_to_ally` | Number | The maximum distance the AI will maintain from ally units. | 4 ||

| `fully_complete_difficulty` | Number | The difficulty level required to be fully completed. | 4 ||

| [`good`](./Miscellaneous.md#context-good) | Boolean | If true, indicates the positive outcome branch for events or spawning contexts. | 3 ||
| [`jestercat`](./Enums.md#enum-jestercat) | Enum | Specifies the boss or miniboss configuration for JesterCat, often set to "auto" for procedural generation. | 3 ||
| `simple` | Boolean | If true, the AI uses simplified decision-making logic. | 3 ||

| `chapter_common` | Number | The weight or probability for this entry to appear in the common loot pool for its chapter. | 3 ||
| [`cant_afford`](#object-cant_afford) | Object | Defines the dialog sequence that plays when the player attempts to purchase an item they cannot afford. | 3 ||
| `chapter` | Enum | Specifies which chapter or scenario this ability is available in. | 3 ||
| `Chicken` | Equation | The number of chicken pickups spawned. | 3 ||
| `consider_aoe` | Boolean | If true, the AI considers area-of-effect damage when evaluating actions. | 3 ||
| `consumables` | Number | The number of consumable items provided or available in this context. | 3 ||
| `danger_avoidance` | Variable | A weight multiplier for the AI's tendency to avoid dangerous positions. | 3 ||
| `distance_to_aggro_target` | Number | The preferred distance the AI tries to maintain from its aggro target. Negative values indicate behind. | 3 ||
| `distance_to_corpse` | Variable | The preferred distance the AI tries to maintain from corpses. Negative values indicate moving towards. | 3 ||

| `requires_monoclass_run` | Boolean | If true, this unlock requires the player to have completed a monoclass run. | 3 ||
| [`requires_unlocked_npc`](./Enums.md#enum-requires_unlocked_npc) | Enum | Specifies the NPC that must be unlocked before this event or unlock can occur. | 3 ||

| [`complete_chapters`](./Arrays.md#array-complete_chapters) | Array | An array of chapter names that must be completed to unlock this entity. | 3 ||
| `count` | Array / Integer | The number of units to spawn or enrage, as a fixed number or a range [min max]. | 3 ||
| [`emit_timespread_curve`](./Enums.md#enum-emit_timespread_curve) | Enum | The curve type (e.g., ease_out) that defines how emission rate changes over time. | 3 ||

| [`rematch_cutscene_day`](./Enums.md#enum-rematch_cutscene_day) | Enum | Specifies the cutscene to play on the day of the rematch. | 3 ||
| [`tooltip_reference_applier`](./Strings.md#string-tooltip_reference_applier) | String | A localization key for the tooltip description displayed to the applier of this status effect. | 3 ||
| [`tooltip_stackless_neg`](./Strings.md#string-tooltip_stackless_neg) | String | Localization key for the tooltip of the negative variant when not showing stack count. | 3 ||

| `wolfcat` | Number | A flag (1) indicating the wolfcat special voice set is enabled. | 1 ||
| `yeticat` | Number | A flag (1) indicating the yeticat special voice set is enabled. | 1 ||
| `asymmetric` | Boolean | If true, the mutation is applied asymmetrically (e.g., different on each side). | 1 ||
| [`back`](#object-back) | Object | If true, the face is rendered facing away (back of head view). | 1 ||
| [`background_shader`](./Enums.md#enum-background_shader) | Enum | Specifies the background shader to apply (e.g., 'meatpulse_ground'). | 1 ||
| [`barf`](#object-barf) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, downward rotation, open mouth, and closed eyes (vomiting). | 1 ||
| [`barf_attack`](#object-barf_attack) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, downward rotation, open mouth, and open eyes (attack while vomiting). | 1 ||
| [`barf_prep`](#object-barf_prep) | Object | Defines a face expression with slightly raised eyebrows, downward rotation, closed mouth, and closed eyes (preparing to vomit). | 1 ||
| [`bite`](Events_and_Encounters.md#object-bite) | Object | Specifies the player character's attempt to bite the encounter. | 1 ||
| [`bloodthirsty`](#object-bloodthirsty) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, upward rotation, smiling mouth, and open eyes (savage aggression). | 1 ||
| [`bloodthirsty_eyes_closed`](#object-bloodthirsty_eyes_closed) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, upward rotation, smiling mouth, closed eyes, and an offset face position. | 1 ||
| [`bored`](#object-bored) | Object | Defines a face expression with slightly raised eyebrows, neutral rotation, closed mouth, and open eyes (disinterest). | 1 ||
| [`boss_background_alt`](./Enums.md#enum-boss_background_alt) | Enum | Specifies the alternative boss background to use (e.g., 'CoreBossBG'). | 1 ||
| `BreedSuppression` | Number | The amount of breeding suppression provided by the furniture piece. | 1 ||
| [`built_in_collision`](./Arrays.md#array-built_in_collision) | Array | A list of collision geometry definitions for the room. | 1 ||
| [`butcher_portrait`](#object-butcher_portrait) | Object | Defines the face expression for the butcher's portrait with offset, raised eyebrows, slight rotation, smile, and open eyes. | 1 ||
| [`chain_chance`](./Enums.md#enum-chain_chance) | Enum | A probability (0.9) that a chain effect triggers. | 1 ||
| `chance` | Number | A probability (decimal or percentage) for a form change or other effect to occur. | 1 ||
| `choose_cat_with_min_health` | Number | Selects a cat with at least the specified percentage of health remaining. | 1 ||
| [`choose_one`](./Arrays.md#array-choose_one) | Array | A list of generation flags from which exactly one is randomly selected. | 1 ||
| [`Colorless_Tutorial`](./Arrays.md#array-colorless_tutorial) | Array | An array of return quotes used for the Colorless tutorial. | 1 ||
| [`CompletionCheckmarkTooltip`](./Arrays.md#array-completioncheckmarktooltip) | Array | An array of strings defining which completion checkmark tooltips to show. | 1 ||
| [`concentrate`](#object-concentrate) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, strong upward rotation, closed mouth, and closed eyes (focus). | 1 ||
| `continual_emission` | Boolean | If true, the particle effect emits continuously. | 1 ||
| [`dead`](./Miscellaneous.md#context-dead) | Enum | Determines the animation set used when the unit is dead. | 1 ||
| [`dead_facecenter`](#object-dead_facecenter) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, downward rotation, closed mouth, closed eyes, centered offset (death face). | 1 ||
| [`dead_faceleft`](#object-dead_faceleft) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, downward rotation, closed mouth, closed eyes, offset left (death face). | 1 ||
| [`destroy`](Events_and_Encounters.md#object-destroy) | Object | An object defining the player action to destroy an object, including its stat check and outcomes. | 1 ||
| [`devious`](#object-devious) | Object | Defines a face expression with very raised eyebrows, upward rotation, smiling mouth, closed eyes, and right offset (sly look). | 1 ||
| [`devious2`](#object-devious2) | Object | Defines a face expression with very raised eyebrows, upward rotation, smiling mouth, closed eyes, and offset right-up (devious variant). | 1 ||
| [`distraught`](#object-distraught) | Object | Defines a face expression with raised eyebrows, downward rotation, closed mouth, closed eyes, and large downward offset (grief). | 1 ||
| [`dreamworks`](#object-dreamworks) | Object | Defines a face expression with asymmetric eyebrow raise and rotation, smiling mouth (dreamworks smile pose). | 1 ||
| [`dreamworks2`](#object-dreamworks2) | Object | Defines a face expression with stronger asymmetric eyebrow raise, smiling mouth (dreamworks smile variant). | 1 ||
| [`druid_portrait`](#object-druid_portrait) | Object | Defines the face expression for the druid portrait with offset, raised eyebrows, asymmetric rotation, smile, and mixed eye states. | 1 ||
| [`ears_down`](#object-ears_down) | Object | Defines a pose where both ears rotate downward and eyebrows lower (sad/submissive). | 1 ||
| [`ears_down_overshoot`](#object-ears_down_overshoot) | Object | Defines an overshoot pose where both ears rotate further downward and eyebrows lower more. | 1 ||
| [`ears_left`](#object-ears_left) | Object | Defines a pose where the left ear rotates left and the right ear rotates right. | 1 ||
| [`ears_right`](#object-ears_right) | Object | Defines a pose where the left ear rotates right and the right ear rotates left. | 1 ||
| [`ears_up`](#object-ears_up) | Object | Defines a pose where both ears rotate upward and eyebrows raise (alert/happy). | 1 ||
| [`ears_up_overshoot`](#object-ears_up_overshoot) | Object | Defines an overshoot pose where both ears rotate further upward and eyebrows raise more. | 1 ||
| [`element`](./Enums.md#enum-element) | Array / Enum | Specifies which element(s) the conditional checks against. | 1 ||
| [`else`](Abilities_and_Spells.md#object-else) | Object | Specifies the fallback outcome when the primary condition in a conditional reward is not met. | 1 ||
| [`emitshape_scale`](./Arrays.md#array-emitshape_scale) | Array | A 2D scale factor [x, y] applied to the particle emission shape. | 1 ||
| [`ending_cutscene`](./Enums.md#enum-ending_cutscene) | Enum | Specifies which ending cutscene to play (e.g., 'hitler_end'). | 1 ||
| [`ending_cutscene2`](./Enums.md#enum-ending_cutscene2) | Enum | Specifies a secondary ending cutscene to play (e.g., 'credits_3'). | 1 ||
| [`euphoric`](#object-euphoric) | Object | Defines the facial expression configuration for the euphoric emotional state of a unit. | 1 ||
| [`extra_bound_planes`](./Arrays.md#array-extra_bound_planes) | Array | A list of additional boundary planes for the room. | 1 ||
| [`eyes_closed`](#object-eyes_closed) | Object | Defines a simple pose with closed eyes and closed mouth. | 1 ||
| [`face_center`](#object-face_center) | Object | Defines a pose with the face centered at its default offset [0, 0]. | 1 ||
| [`face_down_wince`](#object-face_down_wince) | Object | Defines a wincing face expression with raised eyebrows, downward rotation, open mouth, closed eyes, and downward offset. | 1 ||
| [`face_far_down`](#object-face_far_down) | Object | Defines a pose with the face offset far downward. | 1 ||
| [`face_far_down_right`](#object-face_far_down_right) | Object | Defines a pose with the face offset far down-right. | 1 ||
| [`face_far_left`](#object-face_far_left) | Object | Defines a pose with the face offset far left. | 1 ||
| [`face_far_left_eyes_closed`](#object-face_far_left_eyes_closed) | Object | Defines a pose with the face offset far left, closed eyes, and closed mouth. | 1 ||
| [`face_far_right`](#object-face_far_right) | Object | Defines a pose with the face offset far right. | 1 ||
| [`face_far_up`](#object-face_far_up) | Object | Defines a pose with the face offset far upward. | 1 ||

### Object: `passives`


**Definition:** Object listing intrinsic passive modifiers.  
**Total Count:** 2805
